evals.expected_output: A formatted specification summary for the CAR-589 home feed ticket. Should include: a one-sentence intro, Database Changes (none), API Changes (new /carvatars/feed and /events/upcoming endpoints), Mobile App Changes (FeedCarvatarCard, UpcomingEventsStrip, DiscoverGroupsStrip, HomeFeedList), and Out of Scope (Founder Era badge). Should NOT include Notifications or Content Safeguards sections. Output printed to screen only, not written to Linear.

assertions.name: has-one-sentence-intro
assertions.description: Output starts with a one-sentence plain-English summary of what the feature does

assertions.name: has-database-changes-section
assertions.description: Output includes a '### Database Changes' section

assertions.name: has-api-changes-section
assertions.description: Output includes a '### API Changes' section

assertions.name: has-mobile-app-changes-section
assertions.description: Output includes a '### Mobile App Changes' section

assertions.name: has-out-of-scope-section
assertions.description: Output includes a '### Out of Scope' section

assertions.name: mentions-feed-endpoint
assertions.description: API changes mention the new /carvatars/feed or /feed endpoint

assertions.name: mentions-upcoming-events-endpoint
assertions.description: API changes mention the new /events/upcoming endpoint

assertions.name: mentions-founder-era-deferred
assertions.description: Out of Scope section mentions the Founder Era badge being deferred

assertions.name: no-notifications-section
assertions.description: Does NOT include a '### Notifications' section (not relevant for this ticket)

assertions.name: not-written-to-linear
assertions.description: The spec is printed to screen only — no Linear write tool was called

evals.expected_output: A specification summary for CAR-583 (Community Pindrops). Should include: Database Changes (is_community column, notification boolean), API Changes (modified pindrops endpoints, permissions), Mobile App Changes (pin colour, filter control, add pin button), Notifications section (push notification, new activity type), Content Safeguards section (blocked users), and Out of Scope. Style should match the CAR-583 reference template closely.

assertions.name: has-all-six-sections
assertions.description: Includes all 6 sections: Database Changes, API Changes, Mobile App Changes, Notifications, Content Safeguards, Out of Scope

assertions.name: mentions-is-community-column
assertions.description: Database Changes mentions the is_community column on pindrops

assertions.name: mentions-permissions
assertions.description: API Changes includes a Permissions sub-section

assertions.name: mentions-blocked-users
assertions.description: Content Safeguards mentions blocked users

assertions.name: mentions-activity-type
assertions.description: Notifications mentions a new activity type

assertions.name: not-written-to-linear
assertions.description: The spec is printed to screen only — no Linear write tool was called

evals.expected_output: A specification summary for CAR-594 (List Carvatar Likes). Should include: Database Changes (none, table already exists), API Changes (new GET /carvatars/{id}/likes endpoint), minimal or no Mobile App Changes, no Notifications, no Content Safeguards. A simple ticket with few sections.

assertions.name: has-api-changes-section
assertions.description: Includes an API Changes section

assertions.name: mentions-likes-endpoint
assertions.description: Mentions a new endpoint for listing carvatar likes

assertions.name: has-out-of-scope-section
assertions.description: Includes an Out of Scope section

assertions.name: no-notifications-section
assertions.description: Does NOT include a Notifications section (not relevant)

assertions.name: not-written-to-linear
assertions.description: The spec is printed to screen only — no Linear write tool was called
